summary: Post-refactoring regression test completed successfully. All clients.tsx and reservations.tsx sub-components (EditClientModal, NewClientModal, ImportClientModal, GanttChart, ReservationCard, ReservationActionModal) are working correctly after extraction to /app/frontend/app/agency-app/components/.

issues: Route './agency-app/components/*.tsx' is missing the required default export warnings - these are expo-router warnings for files in a route directory that export named components instead of default exports. Non-breaking but should consider moving components to a non-route directory like /components or /shared.
shadow* style props deprecated warning - use boxShadow instead
useNativeDriver not supported warning (React Native Web compatibility)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Move sub-components from /app/agency-app/components/ to /src/components/agency/ to avoid expo-router treating them as routes and suppress the 'missing default export' warnings
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper TypeScript interfaces
Named exports (export const ComponentName) are used correctly and work fine functionally - just expo-router complains about missing default exports in route directories
All sub-components receive props correctly (C for colors, callbacks for actions, data for display)
Proper use of React hooks (useState, useEffect, useMemo, useCallback, useRef)
API calls use proper async/await patterns with error handling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agency admin portal at /admin-login. Clients page at /agency-app/clients shows 4-column card grid with search and modals (New, Import, Edit). Reservations page at /agency-app/reservations has Planning (Gantt chart) and Liste views with status filters and action modal. data-testid attributes may not render in React Native Web but coordinate/text-based clicking works.

clients_page.client_data_display: PASS - Shows name, email, phone, reservation count

reservations_page_list.action_modal: PASS - Opens with Contract (view/generate, send, PDF), Status, Payment sections
